articles.title: Cardano crosses 7 million native assets; ADA reacts in this usual fashion
articles.description: Cardano added a new badge to milestones recently achieved ADA’s price, in a conventional manner, acted oblivious of the incident Native assets on the Cardano [ADA] chain surpassed seven million, the network’s real-time information portal, Adaverse, reported. According to the trusted Cardano data provider, the Proof-of-Stake (PoS) actually crossed the 7.2 million mark. Interestingly, this […]

articles.title: The Three Things That Went Wrong for FTX According to Ripple CTO
articles.description: Ripple CTO believes FTX's collapse was due to "incompetence" and "fraud."

articles.title: Ripple and SEC Collectively Ask Court To Set Key Date As XRP Lawsuit Enters Critical Phase
articles.description: In the legal battle between the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and Ripple Labs, both sides are jointly requesting a deadline related to sealing information in the case. They are asking US District Judge Analisa Torres to set a deadline of January 4th, 2023 for non-parties to file sealing arguments ahead of a summary […]

articles.title: Hopes High As Charles Hoskinson Speaks On Solana Becoming A Sidechain to Cardano
articles.description: In a casual conversation between Cardano community members and Solana community members, it appears that both parties are eyeing the possibility of Solana becoming a Cardano sidechain.

articles.title: Crypto.com Crypto Exchange Provides Proof of Reserves After Panic by Investors – Here’s What You Need to Know
articles.description: Crypto.com has become the latest cryptocurrency exchange to release its Proof of Reserves data from auditing firm Mazars Group, proving that its clients' assets are fully backed one-to-one. According to a Friday blog post, auditing firm Mazars conducted the verification process, revealing that the exchange's bitcoin reserves have a 102% collateralization ratio, its Ethereum reserves a...
